SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http
Interface HttpFileRecorderConstants

public interface HttpFileRecorderConstants

This interface defines constants that can be used to configure the http file recorder.
These parameters must be used with an associated URL.
The pseudo code below records a file to an http server, using the PUT method: 

        Parameters myParameters = myMG.createParameters();
        myParameters.put(HttpRecorderConstants.HTTP_METHOD, HttpRecorderConstants.PUT_METHOD);
        myMG.record(new URI("http://www.server.com/record.jsp"), 0, null, myParameters)

Field Summary
static Parameter HTTP_METHOD
          Indicates witch http method to use for the record.
static Value POST_METHOD
          http POST method
static Value PUT_METHOD
          http PUT method
static MediaErr RECORD_FAILED
          Generic error thrown when the http record fail
static Parameter SUBMIT_TIMEOUT
          The interval in ms to wait for the content to be transfered to the http server before throwing an MediaErr.TIMEOUT event.
 

Field Detail

HTTP_METHOD

static final Parameter HTTP_METHOD
Indicates witch http method to use for the record. Can be either PUT_METHOD or POST_METHOD

PUT_METHOD

static final Value PUT_METHOD
http PUT method

See Also:
HTTP_METHOD

SUBMIT_TIMEOUT

static final Parameter SUBMIT_TIMEOUT
The interval in ms to wait for the content to be transfered to the http server before throwing an MediaErr.TIMEOUT event.

POST_METHOD

static final Value POST_METHOD
http POST method

See Also:
HTTP_METHOD

RECORD_FAILED

static final MediaErr RECORD_FAILED
Generic error thrown when the http record fail
